{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Echoes of Northstrider
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|An echo of a younger [[Northstrider]] appeared alongside [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
